section: # -- client_income.csv: Work income, self-employment, retirement contributions, and pension/annuity income streams.

label: annual_earned_income
notes: Gross in earn_start_year

label: earned_income_last_year
notes: Base; extend via Scenarios > Retire Later

label: earned_income_annual_increase
notes: Growth rate for base years

label: entity_type
notes: s_corp | sole_prop | W2

label: ytd_remainder_earned_income_override
notes: Optional: override the projected remainder-of-year earned income (after actual YTD earned income) instead of a linear pro-rated estimate. Leave blank to use the linear estimate.

label: business_expenses_annual
notes: Schedule C ordinary deductions

label: home_office_expenses_annual
notes: Form 8829

label: health_insurance_premiums_annual
notes: SEHI above-the-line deduction

label: qbi_eligible
notes: S.199A 20% QBI deduction

label: reasonable_salary_annual
notes: W-2 salary; FICA on this only

label: sehi_added_to_w2
notes: SEHI via W-2 box 1

label: state_corporate_surcharge_rate
notes: IL surcharge on distributable income

label: qbi_phaseout_applies
notes: True if income near S.199A phaseout

label: monthly_401k_contribution
notes: Pre-tax; Member 1 only during earned years

label: annual_401k_limit_base_year
notes: Includes age-50+ catch-up

label: ss_funding_discount_year
notes: First year Social Security gross benefits are reduced for trust-fund underfunding stress. Default 2032.

label: ss_funding_discount_pct
notes: Percentage reduction to gross Social Security benefits from the funding-discount year onward. Default 22%.

label: first_payment
notes: treat as Single annuity (terminates at Wife death); no J&S continuation despite legacy CSV note

label: cumulative_at_death
notes: authoritative total payments through end-of-payments date

label: dividend_rate
notes: annual dividend rate paid on this annuity every year

label: additional_income_pct
notes: share of each dividend kept as additional income / reinvested - applies from the first-distribution year (= first_payment year); before that year the dividend is 100% additional income

label: deferral_years
notes: Years before income where dividends were reinvested.

label: qualified
notes: Employer pension plan

label: initial_guaranteed_income_payment
notes: initial guaranteed income payment for this annuity (the guaranteed payment in the first-distribution year)

label: payout_type
notes: Fixed | Variable | COLA — MC behavior: Fixed: payment unchanged; Variable: scaled by sampled portfolio return vs expected; COLA: scaled by sampled inflation
